Ashen Throne

A world forged in fire. An empire built on bone.

Play Free
Scroll
The Shattered Realm

An ancient empire
consumed by unholy fire

A thousand years ago, the gods waged their last war and the world broke apart. Now, kingdoms rise from the ashes — fragile, hungry, and armed. The Ashen Throne sits empty. Every warlord, sorcerer, and exile believes it belongs to them. The only law left is the one written in blood.

Visceral Combat

Real-time action combat with combo chains, aerial juggling, and devastating awakening skills. Every class fights differently.

Boundless Exploration

Traverse scorched deserts, sunken cities, and cursed forests. A seamless open world with no loading screens and hidden secrets.

Deep Crafting

Mine, forge, enchant. Build trade empires, brew alchemical elixirs, and craft legendary weapons that shape the battlefield.

Choose Your Path

Forged for War

Six battle-hardened classes, each with a unique awakening

Warden

Tank
Shield WallFortifyIron Will

An unbreakable bulwark of steel. The Warden holds the line when all others fall.

Shadowblade

Assassin
VanishBackstabShadow Step

Death from the shadows. The Shadowblade strikes before you ever see the blade.

Pyremancer

Mage
InfernoBlightAsh Storm

Channels the fire that broke the world. Every spell leaves scorched earth behind.

Dreadknight

Berserker
CleaveBlood RageUndying

Born in blood, fueled by rage. The Dreadknight grows stronger as the battle grows desperate.

Oathsinger

Support
HymnAegisResurrect

Ancient songs that mend bone and ward evil. The Oathsinger turns the tide without drawing steel.

Voidcaller

Summoner
RiftDemonbindEntropy

Tears holes in reality to unleash abominations. Power without limit — and without mercy.

Explore All Classes →
Why Fight

A War Worth Waging

Power. Territory. Glory. Every reason to draw your blade.

500+
Players Per Server

Open World PvP

No safe zones. No mercy. Massive siege battles where guilds clash over territory, resources, and pride. Form alliances or betray them — the battlefield is your kingdom.

60+
Active Guilds

Guild Wars

Declare war, conquer strongholds, and tax the defeated. Guild politics shape the world.

200+
Hours of Content

Life Skills & Crafting

Fish, farm, cook, trade, and build. A full economy driven entirely by player hands.

12
World Bosses

Boss Raids

Monstrous god-beasts that require entire alliances to topple. Legendary loot awaits the bold — and the cunning.

Dispatches

Latest News

Mar 25, 2026Update

The Crimson Siege — Chapter III Arrives

New territories, two elite dungeons, and the awakening of the Dreadknight class. The war enters its bloodiest chapter.

Mar 18, 2026Event

Eclipse Festival — Limited-Time Rewards

The veil thins. Earn exclusive armor sets, void mounts, and the legendary Eclipse Greatsword during this seasonal event.

Mar 12, 2026Patch

Patch 2.4.1 — Balance & Stability

Shadowblade combo adjustments, server merge improvements, and 40+ bug fixes. Full notes inside.

The Shattered Realm Awaits

Free to play. No barriers. No mercy. Download the launcher and step into a world that will not forgive the unprepared.
